name: super-puper-powers
description: SPP: a 10-phase pipeline from idea to deployed product for non-developers. Based on obra/superpowers v6.1.1.

interface.shortDescription: An idea-to-deployed-product pipeline for people who don't write code
interface.longDescription: Use Super Puper Powers to take a product idea all the way to a deployed product across ten phases: discovery, MVP scoping, stack selection, spec writing, planning, implementation, release, deploy, and operations. Every gate is asked in product language — scenarios, demos, money — never diffs or architecture. The obra/superpowers engineering core (TDD, debugging, code review, subagent-driven development) is vendored inside.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for a product I want to build.
Help me take this idea to a working product.
